name: obsidian-dashboard
description: Your personal command center for Obsidian — memos, todos, projects, and quick links in one stunning glassmorphism dashboard.
author: Renhao Wan <2653990378@qq.com>

scripts.build: node build-css.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
